'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 13''' was the thirteenth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[March 27]], [[2002]]. The issue was authored by [[Darren Allanson]], [[Iain Lowson]] and [[Jim Swallow]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|The Naboo Blockade]]
*[[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]]
*[[Boushh/Legends|Boushh]]
*[[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]]
*[[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]]
*[[FX-series medical assistant droid/Legends|FX Medical Assistant]]
*[[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]
*[[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-Wing Starfighter]]
